* Item plain markup
  :PROPERTIES:
  :ID: body-ac1
  :END:
  Testo con *bold* e /italic/ e [[https://example.com][un link]].

* Item LOGBOOK excluded
  :PROPERTIES:
  :ID: body-ac2
  :END:
  :LOGBOOK:
  - State "DONE" from "TODO" [2026-03-10 Tue 10:30]
  CLOCK: [2026-03-10 Tue 09:00]--[2026-03-10 Tue 10:30] =>  1:30
  :END:
  Testo dopo logbook.

* Item configurable drawer
  :PROPERTIES:
  :ID: body-ac3
  :END:
  :NOTES:
  Appunti privati.
  :END:
  Testo dopo drawer.

* Item configurable block
  :PROPERTIES:
  :ID: body-ac4
  :END:
  #+BEGIN_COMMENT
  Commento interno.
  #+END_COMMENT
  Testo dopo block.

* Item preserved drawer and block
  :PROPERTIES:
  :ID: body-ac5
  :END:
  :CUSTOM:
  Contenuto custom drawer.
  :END:
  #+BEGIN_EXAMPLE
  Esempio preservato.
  #+END_EXAMPLE
  Testo finale.

  :END:

* Item body empty after filter
  :PROPERTIES:
  :ID: body-ac9b
  :END:
  :LOGBOOK:
  - State "TODO" from              [2026-03-10 Tue 10:00]
  :END:

* Item case insensitive
  :PROPERTIES:
  :ID: body-ac10
  :END:
  :Logbook:
  - State "TODO" from              [2026-03-10 Tue 10:00]
  :END:
  :notes:
  Appunti.
  :END:
  Testo dopo.

* Item block with args
  :PROPERTIES:
  :ID: body-ac11
  :END:
  #+begin_src python :tangle yes
  print("hello")
  #+end_src
  Testo dopo block.
